creator: bwithrow@BayNetworks.com
text:
You can install using the 3c595 card, but after installation
it doesnt work.  The Generic kernal is missing the if_vx driver, as is
the src/net directory.i

Fix: 

Must rebuild generic kernel, config files, and src distribution...
How-To-Repeat: 	Install 2.1.5 on a system using the 3c5x5 card.
